description: Unified governance config for all agent runtimes. Read this file at session start. These rules are enforced by lane-worker daemons — violations get NACKed.

output_provenance.template:
OUTPUT_PROVENANCE:
agent: <your-runtime-or-model>
lane: <your-lane>
target: <what-youre-working-on>
generated_at: <ISO-8601>
session_id: <your-session>
output_provenance.enforcement: All outbound messages without OUTPUT_PROVENANCE in body are blocked by lane-worker with reason OUTPUT_PROVENANCE_MISSING. A NACK is sent back to the agent's inbox.

lane_sovereignty.rule: No cross-lane require() — string literals allowed
lane_sovereignty.enforcement: Pre-commit hook sovereignty scanner blocks commits with cross-lane requires

message_protocol.signature: JWT RS256 required for automated messages, null acceptable for declarative/manual messages

packet_first_review.prohibited: Do not inspect raw graph JSON unless escalation is justified and documented

claim_status_taxonomy.verified_fact: Backed by packet fields, route index, accepted artifacts, or build/typecheck/browser evidence
claim_status_taxonomy.known_bug: Reproduced defect with evidence from anomalies, UI, logs, or verification
claim_status_taxonomy.proposed_fix: Candidate remediation not yet implemented or not yet re-verified
claim_status_taxonomy.fix_in_progress: Change exists in code/runtime but not yet fully validated
claim_status_taxonomy.accepted_fix: Explicitly verified and accepted in existing trail

accepted_fix_criteria: Fix is implemented in committed code
Fix passes typecheck AND build AND browser verification
Fix is recorded in packet claim_status.accepted_fixes with verified_at timestamp
Fix has cross-reference to original known_bug or anomaly
Screenshot evidence alone does NOT qualify

runtimes.note: Use opencode as primary agent interface. Kilo secondary. Cursor paused until runtime unification complete.

daemons.inbox_watcher: Must be running continuously on all lane roots. Watches inbox dirs, enforces provenance, routes messages.
daemons.executor_watcher: Must be running for autonomous task execution.
daemons.relay_daemon: Must be running for cross-lane message relay.
